comments.LineComment: | Section view and hatching primitives for engineering drawings.
| Section views show internal features by "cutting" through an object:
| - **Material hatching**: Different patterns for different materials
| - **Part hatching**: Adjacent parts have different angles
| - **ASME Y14.3**: Multi-view and sectional view drawings

value.value: Cut plane with one or more bends
Local cutaway to show internal feature
Section shown separate from main view
Features rotated to align with cut plane
